findings.evidence: `code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing/Characteristic.lean:163` defines `isCharacteristicVector_iff_forall_modEq_intersectionForm (k) : P.IsCharacteristicVector k ↔ ∀ x, (∑ v, k v * x v) ≡ P.intersectionForm x x [ZMOD 2]`; the new proof is exactly `simpa [dotProduct] using ... .mp hk x`.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma and use `(P.isCharacteristicVector_iff_forall_modEq_intersectionForm k).mp hk x` with `simpa [dotProduct]` at the call site, or move/rename only if the existing theorem is being deliberately replaced.
findings.issue: `IsCharacteristicVector.dotProduct_modEq_intersectionForm` is just the forward direction of the existing all-vector characteristic theorem with `dotProduct` notation unfolded, creating parallel API for the same statement.

summary: The new chi definitions are genuinely new, but one exported lemma duplicates the characteristic-form API already present in the adjacent plumbing file.
